cks is a day-long event for high-school students, especially those with limited EECS experience, to come to UC Berkeley and simply make something of their own. A showcase is held at the end of the day, giving attendees the chance to demo their creati

, giving attendees the chance to demo their creations to fellow students and parents. Students can choose from one of our starter projects, or work on anything of their choice; in either case, experienced HKN members will be glad to offer individuali

nced HKN members will be glad to offer individualized guidance and support throughout the day. Event Details: Annual, Fall Semester Sample Schedule: 10:00 a.m. - 10:30 a.m. Sign In 10:30 a.m. - 11:00 a.m. Speaker 11:00 a.m. - 3:30 p.m. Hack! 3:00 p.m
